content: We can reframe a single autonomous AI agent itself as an embedded three-stage progressive reinforcement learning system that evolves its own internal memory and curiosity drive over its operational lifetime, rather than treating three-stage progressive RL as only a training-time framework for building agents. The first stage corresponds to the agent’s early exploration phase (curiosity-driven environment familiarization encoded in episodic memory), the second to active learning on encountered out-of-distribution tasks that updates its semantic long-term memory, and the third to hybrid planning that fine-tunes reactive policies for recurring real-world scenarios.
